title: Connectedness
description: Unofficial Fork of Continuity that works with Forge
body:
# Connectedness

Connectedness is a mod that serves as a port of the [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) mod to the Forge. It offers an optimized connected textures experience for resource packs that utilize the Optifine CTM format. The mod provides full support for Optifine-format emissive textures for block and item models.

Connectedness comes with two built-in resourcepacks - one provides default connected textures, similar to Optifine, and the other provides a fix for glass pane culling. Please note that Connectedness requires [Reforgium](https://modrinth.com/mod/reforgium) to function properly.

*Note: Connectedness is not affiliated with Continuity*
